title: AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN SUMS APPROPRIATED IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED AND REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4139 / 57 OG No. 12, 2112 (March 20, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2887, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN SUMS APPROPRIATED IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED AND REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sum appropriated under item 25, for the Province of Albay, page 434, paragraph g, Section two of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred, to wit:

"25. Municipal Building, including pur-

chase of a site, Legaspi ....................P20, 000.00;"

and the sums appropriated under item 18, for the Province of Albay, page 133, paragraph g, Section two of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen, and item (39), for the Province of Albay, page 209, paragraph c, Title A, Section four of the same Act, namely:

"18. Municipal Building, Legaspi........................57,000.00

"(39). Legaspi Municipal Building, Albay .............43,000.00;"

totalling one hundred twenty thousand pesos, are hereby re-appropriated for the construction of a gymnasium and grandstand and the purchase of additional site for the central school at Porong-banwa, Camalig, Albay.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
